net.openhft.chronicle.core.util

Interface SerializableUpdater<U>

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Consumer<U>, Serializable, Updater<U>
    Functional Interface:
    This is a functional interface and can therefore be used as the assignment target for a lambda expression or method reference.

    @FunctionalInterface
public interface SerializableUpdater<U>
extends Updater<U>, Serializable
    This interface expect to take an object for alteration and it must be serializable.

    • Method Summary

      • Methods inherited from interface net.openhft.chronicle.core.util.Updater

        accept, update

      • Methods inherited from interface java.util.function.Consumer

        andThen
